description: Task-type-level prompt templates for benchmark CSV normalization.

static_scf.prompt_constraints: Prepare an INCAR for a standalone static total-energy calculation.
static_scf.prompt_context: This is a single-point SCF task, not a structure relaxation or post-processing workflow.

geometry_relax.prompt_constraints: Prepare an INCAR for a geometry optimization.
geometry_relax.prompt_context: This task should relax the structure until forces are small; it is not a static single-point or post-processing step.

line_mode_bands.prompt_constraints: Assume the charge density comes from a prior SCF run and this task is only the line-mode band calculation.
line_mode_bands.prompt_context: This is a non-self-consistent band-structure step, not a geometry optimization or a fresh SCF run.

dos_nscf.prompt_constraints: Assume this is a DOS calculation using a previously converged charge density.
dos_nscf.prompt_context: This is a non-self-consistent DOS post-processing step, not a fresh SCF run or a geometry optimization.
